---
title: "TCHÉCALEX 2024"
description: "My first international conference presentation experience"
author: "Event"
date: "2024-05-26"
categories: [event, presentation]
image: "featured.JPG"
format:
  html:
    css: newspaper.css
#css: /custom.css
#draft: true
---

Just got back from **Tchécalex 2024**, held at the **Faculty of Arts of the University of West Bohemia** in **Plzeň** — also known in English as **Pilsen** — in Czechia.

Bruno (Courbon) and I presented work on French-English comparisons of the **degree adverb + Place** construction on Twitter/X, with examples such as *Hockey is very Montréal*. A publication stemming from this preliminary work is planned for the conference proceedings.


<!--Include social share buttons-->

{{< include /files/includes/_socialshare.qmd >}}
